bedrockminer.config.toggle_enabled.comme: Toggle the Fabric Bedrock Miner on/off
bedrockminer.config.approach.comment:
Bedrock Breaking mode.

§aVanilla Fast§r: works on vanilla, fast, but can only break bedrock from up to down,
or from down to up.
§aVanilla All Direction§r: works on vanilla, can bread bedrock from all
direction, but speed is limited by server's syncing
player's yRot and yHeadRot speed.
§aCarpet Accurate§r: for server installed Carpet Extra and
with accurateBlockPlacement enabled, you can use this
mode to break bedrock from all directions very fast
bedrockminer.config.opengui.comment: Hotkey to open the config GUI
bedrockminer.config.max_retries.comment: Maximum number of retries for block breaking
bedrockminer.config.wait_ticks.comment: Maximum ticks to wait for piston extend/retract
Force rebuild render sections to remove ghost blocks after breaking
bedrockminer.config.skip_instant_mine_ch: Skip check for instant mine piston block ability (Efficiency V + Haste II)
bedrockminer.config.support_block.commen: Support block used to support redstone torch (e.g. slime block)
bedrockminer.config.alloworblockmode.com: For blocks not in blocklist or allowlist, allow or block using Fabric Bedrock Miner on them
bedrockminer.config.blockList.comment: List of blocks to block/allow based on mode (e.g. minecraft:stone)
bedrockminer.config.allowList.comment: Additional blocks to always allow (appended to server list when on server)
bedrockminer.config.server.blockList.com: Server-side list of blocks to block (overrides client config)
bedrockminer.config.server.allowList.com: Server-side list of blocks to always allow (overrides client config)
bedrockminer.config.server.alloworblockm: Server-side mode for blocks not in list (overrides client config)
bedrockminer.config.server.waitServerTic:
Number of ticks to wait for server to update player entity's
§5§oyHeadRot§r (used in §aVanilla All Direction§r mode)
Increase this value if you frequently failed to break block in
§aVanilla All Direction§r mode
bedrockminer.message.cannot_find_approac: Cannot find a valid approach for %s!
bedrockminer.message.invalid_support_blo: Invalid support block! Must be sturdy on top face，so we can place redstone torch above it.
bedrockminer.message.invalid_block_name: Invalid block name: %s! Reverted to previous list.
bedrockminer.message.need_efficiency: Cannot instantly mine piston! Need Efficiency V pickaxe + Haste II
bedrockminer.config.server.note:
§a§lFollowing config options is managed by server side's Fabric Bedrock Miner, 
modify them here has no effect§r
bedrockminer.message.protocol_mismatch: §c[Bedrock Miner]§r Protocol version mismatch! Server: %s, Client: %s. Using default config.
bedrockminer.message.server_installed: §a[Bedrock Miner]§r Server has Bedrock Miner installed!
bedrockminer.config.area.hide_area_box_b: Hide area restriction box lines behind blocks
bedrockminer.message.restricted.server_s: %s is restricted because the server does not have Bedrock Miner installed.
bedrockminer.message.restricted.server_b: %s is blocked by the server Bedrock Miner config.
bedrockminer.message.restricted.server_a: %s is not allowed by the server Bedrock Miner config.
bedrockminer.message.restricted.area: Block at %s, %s, %s is outside the allowed mining area.
bedrockminer.message.bedrock_right_click: Toggle Fabric Bedrock Miner: %s | Open config: %s
